reason: Bitcoin is in a strong Markup phase, demonstrating significant upward momentum and outperforming traditional assets, having reached a one-month high of $73,800. This indicates strong bullish sentiment and potential for further price discovery. However, the market is near all-time highs, increasing inherent volatility and risk for new entries. Geopolitical factors (Iran war context) and regulatory actions (U.S. sanctions on crypto laundering) introduce additional uncertainties, necessitating close monitoring for potential catalysts or headwinds.
headlines: Bitcoin rises to one-month high of $73,800, continuing to outperform since start of Iran war
U.S. sanctions 6 people, 2 companies that laundered $800 million in crypto for North Korea
CoinDesk 20 performance update: index jumps 3.7% as all constituents climb higher
Bitcoin's building steam and a $3 billion trigger could make it wild
Bitcoin outperforms stocks, tops $72,000 even as dollar strengthens
